Capture insights from web & videos fast with Flash Insights. Efficient extension for summaries & improved browsing.

Introducing Flash Insights, a free browser extension that empowers you to seamlessly extract valuable insights from any web page or video in seconds, using AI chatbots with web access.

Flash Insights crafts a prompt that you can easily paste into your chatbot.

🎯 Key Features:

1️⃣ Optimized for AI Chatbot Usage: Flash Insights prepares your findings specifically for easy copy-pasting into web-powered AI chatbots.

2️⃣ Versatile and Customizable Insights: Get summaries, bullet points, simplified explanations, or detailed action plans tailored to your needs and preferences.

3️⃣ Wide Range of Applications: From recipes and news analysis to educational content, Flash Insights empowers users to make the most of online content.

4️⃣ User-Friendly and Accessible: Flash Insights' clean interface and straightforward process make it easy for anyone to extract knowledge from web content.

5️⃣ Completely Free and Always Available: Access Flash Insights' powerful features without spending a dime, ensuring that valuable knowledge is readily available for everyone.

6️⃣ Time-Saving and Efficient Learning: Quickly extract valuable information from web content or YouTube videos, allowing you to learn more in less time.

🔧 How it Works:

🅰️ Activate Flash Insights: Simply click the Flash Insights extension icon while reading an article, browsing the web, or watching a YouTube video to start extracting valuable information.

🅱️ Make any web page or video chatbot-compatible: Flash Insights prepares the message for web-powered AI chatbots, making it easy to extract valuable insights from any web page or video.

🅾️ Unlock AI-Powered insights: Simply paste the message into your favorite AI chatbot, and watch as it delivers valuable insights from any web page or video.

💡 Empower your browsing experience with Flash Insights. Quick, actionable insights from any web page or video at your fingertips!

⭐ Here's why you'll LOVE Flash Insights:

Save time and boost your knowledge with Flash Insights, the ultimate tool for rapid insights and actionable plans from any online content.

💼 Flash Insights is an independent software and is not affiliated with YouTube, Google, Microsoft, Bing, OpenAI, or ChatGPT. Flash Insights operates as a separate entity and is solely designed to enhance user experience while browsing online content.

GPT 公式 LaTeX 复制器是一款功能强大的浏览器扩展程序，旨在简化从 ChatGPT、Gemini、DeepSeek 、claude等 AI 聊天平台复制数学公式的流程。该工具非常适合研究人员、教育工作者、学生以及所有在数字环境中频繁处理数学内容的用户。无论你是撰写技术论文、整理作业，还是准备科学报告，这款扩展程序都能弥合 AI 驱动的网页聊天与 Microsoft Word 等专业编辑工具之间的鸿沟。它支持以 LaTeX、MathML 及 Word 专用兼容格式等多种高保真格式轻松复制公式，确保粘贴后的方程式呈现完美、便于编辑。
该扩展程序的核心功能是借助先进的提取技术，处理并转换 AI 聊天界面中渲染的数学公式。当你在 ChatGPT、Gemini 或 DeepSeek 中看到公式时，只需轻点一下，即可打开易用的公式编辑器弹窗。该界面通过强大的数学排版库 KaTeX 实时渲染预览，让你在复制前即可查看并编辑公式。扩展程序可精准处理复杂的数学标记语言，包括深度嵌套表达式及聊天应用采用的自定义编码，确保复制的公式准确无误，适配各类文档环境。
其突出优势之一是内置的 MathML 转 OMML（Office 数学标记语言）转换器，可实现网页公式无缝迁移至 Word。用户可轻松切换 Word 兼容模式 ——Word 2021 与 Word 2025，确保无论使用哪个版本，公式都能正确粘贴。这一贴心设计保证方程式的结构与样式符合 Microsoft Word 的最新标准。扩展程序仅需剪贴板写入权限即可安全复制公式，明确声明不访问或跟踪个人浏览数据，优先保障用户隐私。
扩展程序的弹窗界面支持直观自定义，可动态切换 Word 模式，并提供清晰的视觉提示与实用提示，避免粘贴不兼容格式。实时公式编辑器支持即时调整 LaTeX 语法，配合实时渲染效果，让用户精准预览粘贴后的内容。无论是原始 LaTeX 代码、标准 MathML，还是适用于 Microsoft Word 的直接 OMML 格式，所有复制选项均可一键获取。用户界面还提供智能反馈，如提示消息与视觉指示器，确保工作流程流畅无干扰。
除单独复制外，GPT 公式 LaTeX 复制器还支持右键菜单提取、键盘快捷键与批量复制，节省时间并避免手动重新输入。它在所有支持的 AI 聊天平台上提供一致可靠的体验，成为依赖网页与桌面环境间高效数学工作流的学者、专业人士与学生的必备工具。有了这款扩展程序，数学公式的完美迁移不再繁琐，而是快速优雅的过程。
主要功能：
无缝公式提取：点击 ChatGPT、Gemini、DeepSeek 中的任意公式，即可打开可自定义的编辑窗口。
一键多格式复制：即时获取 LaTeX、MathML 或 Word 专用 OMML 格式，无需手动转换。
全面支持 Microsoft Word：可选 Word 2021 与 2025 兼容模式，确保公式粘贴无误。
高级 MathML 转 OMML 转换：精准处理，粘贴至 Word 文档时保留公式结构与外观。
实时公式编辑与预览：复制前修改 LaTeX 表达式，即时渲染确保准确性。
直观弹窗设置：通过现代易用的界面，轻松切换 Word 兼容模式并查看使用提示。
跨平台一致功能：在 ChatGPT、Gemini、DeepSeek 中无缝运行，随时获取所需公式。
使用方法：
从浏览器扩展商店安装 GPT 公式 LaTeX 复制器。
访问 ChatGPT、Gemini 或 DeepSeek，找到需要复制的数学公式。
点击公式，启动简洁的模态编辑器弹窗，其中包含 KaTeX 实时渲染的 LaTeX 预览。
按需编辑公式，选择所需复制格式 ——LaTeX、MathML 或 Word 专用 OMML。
在扩展程序弹窗中选择目标 Word 兼容模式（Word 2021 或 2025），其中 Word 2021 仅支持单行复制。
点击 “复制”，扩展程序处理公式并以所选格式存入剪贴板。
将复制的公式直接粘贴至 Word、LaTeX 编辑器或其他兼容应用，享受完美格式与便捷编辑。
隐私说明：
不收集任何个人数据。扩展程序仅访问剪贴板用于公式复制，不跟踪浏览行为或存储私人信息。

GPT Formula LaTeX Copier is a powerful browser extension designed to streamline the process of copying mathematical formulas from AI chat platforms like ChatGPT, Gemini, claude and DeepSeek. This tool is ideal for researchers, educators, students, and anyone who frequently works with mathematical content in digital environments. Whether you're writing technical papers, assembling homework, or preparing scientific reports, this extension bridges the gap between AI-driven web chats and professional editing tools such as Microsoft Word. It allows you to copy formulas effortlessly in multiple high-fidelity formats including LaTeX, MathML, and special Word-compatible formats, enabling flawless equation representation and easy editing wherever you paste them.

At its core, GPT Formula LaTeX Copier processes and converts math formulas rendered within AI chats by leveraging advanced extraction techniques. When you come across a formula in ChatGPT, Gemini, or DeepSeek, a simple click opens a user-friendly formula editor popup. This interface provides a live preview rendered with KaTeX, a robust math typesetting library, allowing you to review and edit the formula before copying. The extension expertly handles complex math markup, including deeply nested expressions and custom encoding used by chat applications, ensuring the formulas copied are accurate and ready for various document environments.

One of its standout capabilities is the built-in MathML to OMML (Office Math Markup Language) converter that makes transferring web-based formulas into Word seamless. Users can easily switch between Word compatibility modes—Word 2021 and Word 2025—ensuring formulas are pasted correctly regardless of the version they use. This thoughtful inclusion guarantees that your equations maintain their structure and style, adhering to Microsoft Word’s evolving standards. The extension only requires clipboardWrite permissions to copy formulas securely and explicitly does not access or track personal browsing data, prioritizing user privacy.

Customization is intuitive with the extension’s popup interface, enabling dynamic switching between Word modes with clear visual cues and helpful tips so you never paste in an incompatible format. The live formula editor allows tweaking LaTeX syntax on-the-fly, complemented with real-time rendering so users see exactly what will be pasted. Whether you need raw LaTeX code, standard MathML, or direct OMML for Microsoft Word, all copying options are one click away. The user interface also provides intelligent feedback such as toasts and visual indicators to keep your workflow smooth and distraction-free.

Beyond individual copying, GPT Formula LaTeX Copier supports right-click context menu extraction, keyboard shortcuts, and batch copying, saving time and eliminating manual retyping. It delivers a consistent, reliable experience across supported AI chat platforms, making it indispensable for academics, professionals, and students who depend on robust math workflows bridging the web and desktop environments. With this extension, perfect mathematical formula transfers are no longer a chore, but a quick and elegant process.

Key Features:  
- Seamless formula extraction: Click any formula in ChatGPT, Gemini, or DeepSeek to open a customizable editor window.  
- One-click copying in multiple formats: Instantly get LaTeX, MathML, or OMML for Word without manual conversions.  
- Full Microsoft Word support: Select between Word 2021 and 2025 compatibility modes to ensure flawless formula pasting.  
- Advanced MathML to OMML conversion: Precise processing preserves formula structure and appearance when pasted into Word documents.  
- Live formula editing and preview: Modify LaTeX expressions with instant rendering before copying to ensure accuracy.  
- Intuitive popup settings: Easily toggle Word compatibility modes and access usage tips via a modern, accessible user interface.  
- Consistent cross-platform functionality: Works seamlessly in ChatGPT, Gemini, and DeepSeek, ensuring you always have access to your formulas.  

How It Works:  
1. Install GPT Formula LaTeX Copier from your browser’s extension store.  
2. Navigate to ChatGPT, Gemini, or DeepSeek and find any displayed mathematical formula you wish to copy.  
3. Click on the formula to launch a sleek modal editor popup featuring a live KaTeX-rendered LaTeX preview.  
4. Edit the formula if necessary, and choose your preferred copy format—LaTeX, MathML, or OMML for Word.  
5. Select the desired Word compatibility mode within the extension’s popup (either Word 2021 or 2025), but Word 2021 only supports single-line copying .  
6. Click “Copy”—the extension processes the formula and places it onto your clipboard in the chosen format.  
7. Paste the copied formula directly into Word, LaTeX editor, or any other compatible application, enjoying perfect formatting and easy edits.  

Privacy: - No personal data collected. The extension only accesses the clipboard for formula copying and does not track your browsing or store private information.

Xpath Ninja is a game-changing extension for Chrome that revolutionizes the way you generate XPath expressions. With its user-friendly interface and intuitive functionality, Xpath Ninja allows you to effortlessly generate XPath expressions and their corresponding variable names by simply clicking on elements within any webpage.

No more tedious manual XPath creation or guesswork. Xpath Ninja empowers developers, testers, and enthusiasts of all skill levels to quickly and accurately generate XPath expressions with just a few clicks. Whether you're a automation enthusiast, web developer professional, or an quality assurance, Xpath Ninja is the must-have tool in your arsenal.

And now, accessing Xpath Ninja is even easier! After installing the extention open the inspect panel with the shortcut Ctrl+Shift+I, you can navigate to the "Elements" panel section and find the dedicated "Xpath Ninja" panel. This streamlined integration ensures that you have instant access to Xpath Ninja's powerful features, right at your fingertips.

But Xpath Ninja doesn't stop there. We've taken it a step further by introducing a seamless integration with Django, the renowned Python web framework. By following our comprehensive documentation, you can unlock the true potential of Xpath Ninja. With the "Start New Test Case" button, you can effortlessly create Python files containing all the XPath expressions for your specific test cases, without the need for complex setup or configuration.

Xpath Ninja simplifies your workflow, saves you time, and enhances your productivity. Experience the power of effortless XPath generation today with Xpath Ninja, the essential Chrome extension for automation testing and web development.
Get ready to conquer XPath challenges like a true ninja!

For any support or inquiries, please don't hesitate to reach out to jdawani@cisco.com
Syncia - Power of ChatGPT on any website
Syncia is a browser extension that allows you to use Open AI's GPT in any website.

Syncia enables users to chat with ChatGPT by opening a sidebar on any website by using the shortcut ctrl+shift+x. In addition, it provides a floating menu underneath any selected text on any website that allows users to generate text summaries, check grammar issues, and customise text length so on ! 

🦾 Features
🗨️ Chat with ChatGPT through a sidebar.
🔑 Use your own Open AI API key.
📜 Quick menu underneath any selected text which allows you to summarise, simplify language, translate, and more.
🗂️ Allows to store custom prompts and use them with quick menu.
💯 Fully customisable settings page.
🔐 Secure and fully Free and open source forever. (Please consider giving this project a star 🌟 and contributing 💖 to support the project.)

For more info check out 
https://github.com/Royal-lobster/Syncia


Note: 
If shortcut is not working, Enter "chrome://extensions/shortcuts", under Syncia set new keyboard shortcut for "Open the sidebar"

Enable this extension and activate the inspect tab in a figma file, the CSS can be automatically copied according to the rules you set after any node is selected

(Automatic copy function is Expired, please copy manually)

Feature:
* Copy Figma Css automatically (Expired, please copy manually)
* Ignore useless comments and unwanted properties
* Set Scale level of the number and custom unit 
* Custom replace rule
* Replace the value by css/less/sass variables
* Different configs for different projects

Usage: 
* Install this plugin and Pin it in the extension bar
* Open or refresh the figma file
* Manually copy the css code, and the code will be modified according to the rules and written to the clipboard
* If the browser ask the permission to read the clipboard, click Allow to read, it read the CSS code only


figma 复制 CSS 插件，开启此插件激活 Inspect(检查）tab，便可以在选中元素之后自动根据设置好的规则复制 CSS 代码。
(自动复制功能已失效，请手动复制)

已支持的特性：
* 自动复制 Figma CSS (已失效，请手动复制)
* 支持过滤无用注释和不需要的属性
* 支持设置缩放级别、CSS 单位
* 自定义替换规则
* css var/less/sass 变量替换
* 多个项目多个配置

使用方法：
* 安装此插件，并固定在扩展栏
* 打开或刷新 figma 设计稿
* 手动复制 CSS 代码，代码就会按照规则修改后写入剪贴板
* 若页面提示阻止读取剪贴板权限，点击允许读取，插件只读取 CSS 内容
Add Markdown copy button to ChatGPT and Gemini responses

ChatGPT & Gemini Markdown Copy - Export AI Conversations in Perfect Markdown

Seamlessly copy AI responses from ChatGPT and Google Gemini in clean, properly formatted Markdown. Perfect for documentation, note-taking, and content creation.

✨ KEY FEATURES

• One-Click Markdown Copy - Add a convenient "M" button next to the native copy button
• Dual Platform Support - Works on both ChatGPT (chatgpt.com, chat.openai.com) and Google Gemini (gemini.google.com)
• Perfect Formatting - Preserves all formatting elements:
  - Code blocks with syntax highlighting
  - Mathematical formulas (KaTeX and Gemini math)
  - Headings, lists, and blockquotes
  - Links, bold, italic, and inline code
• Clean Output - Converts HTML responses to clean, readable Markdown
• Native Integration - Blends seamlessly with the original UI
• Privacy-First - All processing happens locally in your browser, no data collection

🎯 PERFECT FOR

• Developers documenting code solutions
• Technical writers creating tutorials
• Researchers organizing AI conversations
• Students taking notes
• Content creators repurposing AI responses
• Anyone who prefers Markdown format

🚀 HOW IT WORKS

1. Install the extension
2. Visit ChatGPT or Google Gemini
3. Generate a response from the AI
4. Click the "M" button to copy in Markdown format
5. Paste anywhere - your editor, notes, documentation

📋 SUPPORTED MARKDOWN FEATURES

• Headings (H1-H6)
• Bold and italic text
• Code blocks with language detection
• Inline code
• Links and images
• Ordered and unordered lists (with nesting)
• Blockquotes
• Horizontal rules
• Mathematical formulas (inline and block)

🔒 PRIVACY & PERMISSIONS

This extension only requires clipboard write permission to copy text. No data is collected, stored, or transmitted. All processing is done locally in your browser.

💡 OPEN SOURCE

This extension is open source and MIT licensed. Contributions are welcome!

Ease email management for adobe xd prototypes through an extension that creates a toolbox.

📝 About 

In a workflow where we used Adobe Xd as the primary way to validate prototypes, a gap was identified when it came to managing guest emails. The button is only generated when the user has access to invite someone in the prototype, following as access and privileges granted through Adobe Xd.

The author of this extension is free from any malicious use of the source code.

===============

👨🏽‍💻How to use:

1. Install extension
2. Enable extension
3. Go to your adobe xd prototype link or refresh your prototype page

===============

💸 This is a open source project, read more: https://github.com/rpradosilva/adobexd-etools

NotebookLM Bulk Importer & Link Collector Expert (Trial Version)
A convenient tool for optimizing workflow in NotebookLM and collecting/managing multiple URLs

# NotebookLM Bulk Importer & Link Collector Expert (Trial Version)

※ For detailed instructions and the product version, please see here: https://note.com/xxippoxx0000/n/n00b8ac7c11ee

## Boost Your Productivity with Smart URL Management

**NotebookLM Bulk Importer & Link Collector Expert** is a powerful Chrome extension designed to streamline your workflow with Google's NotebookLM and enhance your URL collection capabilities across the web.

### ✨ Key Features

**For NotebookLM Users:**
- Efficiently import multiple URLs into NotebookLM with just a few clicks
- Process web pages and YouTube videos seamlessly
- Simple interface designed to work directly within NotebookLM

**Link Collection Tools:**
- Quickly collect links from any webpage with intuitive keyboard shortcuts
- Easy link management system to organize your collected URLs
- Export your links in multiple formats (CSV, plain text)
- Copy links with or without titles for easy sharing

### 🚀 How It Works

**NotebookLM Bulk Import:**
Simply enter multiple URLs and process them in sequence, saving you time and effort when building your knowledge base.

**Link Collection:**
- Press Alt+A to activate link collection mode with titles
- Press Alt+S to activate URL-only collection mode
- Click on elements to collect all links within them
- Press Esc to exit collection mode

### 💼 Perfect For:
- Researchers collecting multiple sources
- Content creators building reference libraries
- Students organizing study materials
- Anyone who needs to manage multiple URLs efficiently

### 📝 Trial Version Limitations
The trial version limits bulk processing to 10 URLs at once. For unlimited URL processing and additional features, please consider upgrading to the full version.

### 🌐 Language Support
Available in English and Japanese

---

Streamline your NotebookLM workflow and take control of your web research with **NotebookLM Bulk Importer & Link Collector Expert** today!

# NotebookLM 一括インポーター & リンク コレクター エキスパート (試用版)

※詳しい使い方と製品版はこちら：
https://note.com/xxippoxx0000/n/n00b8ac7c11ee

## スマート URL 管理で生産性を向上

**NotebookLM 一括インポーター & リンク コレクター エキスパート** は、Google の NotebookLM を使用したワークフローを効率化し、Web 全体で URL 収集機能を強化するように設計された強力な Chrome 拡張機能です。

### ✨ 主な機能

**NotebookLM ユーザー向け:**
- 数回クリックするだけで、複数の URL を効率的に NotebookLM にインポートできます
- Web ページと YouTube 動画をシームレスに処理できます
- NotebookLM 内で直接操作できるように設計されたシンプルなインターフェイス

**リンク収集ツール:**
- 直感的なキーボード ショートカットを使用して、任意の Web ページからリンクをすばやく収集できます
- 収集した URL を整理するための簡単なリンク管理システム
- リンクを複数の形式 (CSV、プレーン テキスト) でエクスポートできます
- タイトル付きまたはタイトルなしでリンクをコピーして簡単に共有できます

### 🚀 仕組み

**NotebookLM 一括インポート:**
複数の URL を入力して順番に処理するだけで、ナレッジ ベースを構築する際の時間と労力を節約できます。

**リンク コレクション:**
- Alt+A を押すと、タイトル付きのリンク コレクション モードが有効になります
- Alt+S を押すと、URL のみのコレクション モードが有効になります
- 要素をクリックすると、その中のすべてのリンクが収集されます
- Esc を押すと、コレクション モードが終了します

### 💼 最適なユーザー:
- 複数のソースを収集する研究者
- 参照ライブラリを構築するコンテンツ作成者
- 学習資料を整理する学生
- 複数の URL を効率的に管理する必要がある人

### 📝 試用版の制限
試用版では、一度に一括処理できる URL は 10 個に制限されています。無制限の URL 処理と追加機能については、フル バージョンへのアップグレードをご検討ください。

### 🌐 言語サポート
英語と日本語で利用可能

---

今すぐ **NotebookLM Bulk Importer & Link Collector Expert** を使用して、NotebookLM ワークフローを合理化し、Web リサーチを管理しましょう。

Try Clipboard App to copy and paste text into clipboard history, store it, and paste it whenever you want.

Looking for a smarter way to copy and paste? Our Chrome extension lets you save text as ready-to-use notes and paste them anywhere with a right-click from a clipboard history. No more retyping – just copy, save, and paste in seconds! Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, this tool is designed to streamline your workflow and save you valuable time.

🔥 What is Clipboard App & Why Do You Need It?

A memory storage extension stores multiple text snippets, making them easily accessible. It is like a clipboard manager. Unlike a regular pasteboard, which forgets copied text after one use, our universal application lets you save frequently used content and retrieve it whenever needed. Imagine never losing an important email template, a frequently used address, or a complex code snippet again. With our app, your productivity will reach new heights.

🌟 Key Features of the Tool:

✅ Clipboard History – Store and organize saved text for quick access.
✅ Right-Click Paste – Choose saved snippets from a list and paste them instantly.
✅ One-Click Copy to Clipboard & Paste – Speed up your workflow with stored content.
✅ Clipboard Keyboard App Support – Use quick shortcuts for maximum efficiency.
✅ Secure & Private – Your saved text stays with you, ensuring complete privacy.
✅ Cross-Platform Compatibility – Works seamlessly on Mac, Windows, and Chrome OS.
✅ Customizable Snippets – Organize your saved text with tags or categories for easy retrieval.
✅ Sync Across Devices – Access your clipboard history on multiple devices (optional feature).

🛠️ How to Install and Use the App

Using our copy snippet manager is simple and intuitive:

1️⃣ Install the clipboard app from the Chrome Web Store in just a few clicks.
2️⃣ Add text snippets to your clipboard history with a single copy clipboard app action.
3️⃣ Right-click anywhere to access saved snippets and paste your content instantly.
4️⃣ Use the clipboard shortcut for even faster access to your saved notes.

✂️ How Do I Copy and Paste with the App?

If you’re wondering, "How do I copy and paste?", follow these steps:

➤ Select text and press Ctrl + C (Windows) or Cmd + C (Mac) to copy.
➤ Open the copy-to extension and save the text as a note.
➤ Right-click in any text field, choose a saved snippet, and paste it instantly.

With our Google paste tool, you’ll never have to ask "How do I get to my clipboard?" or “How to check clipboard?” again! It’s the ultimate solution for anyone who deals with repetitive text entry or frequently uses the same content.

⚡ Boost Productivity with a Clipboard Manager App

Our clipboard apps help you:

✔ Save Time – No more retyping the same content over and over.
✔ Improve Workflow – Store and retrieve frequently used text in seconds.
✔ Prevent Data Loss – Keep important notes saved and accessible at all times.
✔ Work Smarter – Utilize our clipboard keyboard app for fast access to your snippets.
✔ Stay Organized – Manage your stored text with ease using tags or folders.

🍏 How to Paste on Mac & Windows

For those asking, "How to paste on Mac?" or "How to go to clipboard?", or even “How to access clipboard?”, the process is the same across all platforms:

🖥️ Mac: Right-click anywhere, select a stored snippet from the extension, and insert it instantly.
💻 Windows: Use the same copy-paste text method—right-click and choose from your saved list.

🔍 Apps Like Our Extension – Why Choose Ours?

There are many apps like snippet manager, but our extension stands out because:

Instant Buffer History Access – Save and reuse text effortlessly.
Seamless Right-Click Integration – Paste stored notes in one click.
Custom User Shortcuts – Speed up your workflow with personalized hotkeys.
No Ads, No Distractions – Just a powerful, simple tool designed for efficiency.
Secure and Private – Your stored text stays with you, with no data sharing or tracking.
Lightweight and Fast – Works smoothly without slowing down your browser.

With our clipboard manager, you can also export and import your saved snippets, making it easy to back up your data or transfer it to another device. Plus, the lightweight design ensures it won’t slow down your browser, so you can focus on what matters most – getting things done efficiently. Try it today and see why thousands of users rely on our extension for their daily tasks!
